other: Blade Lineage allies give her {st:BladelineagePride} for bonus {st:AttackUp} and {st:Breath}. If 3+ die, she gains {st:SwordPlayOfTheHomeland} instead for more Coin Power and Damage, and she gains additional {st:Breath} generation.
usage: Gradually gains {st:WindBladeIshmael} on all her skills and when triggering her passive. Having 15+ will trigger her S3-2 as a free skill after her current attack skill.

Triggering her passive gives her {st:AengduNewArmIshmael} for a turn and heals SP for allied Blade Lineage identities. You want her to have the buff as much as possible when using her S1 or S2 to get her coin reuse (assuming she also has 3 {st:Agility} that turn).

Her defense skill gives her a {st:CanDuelGuard} plus an {st:SupportProtect} skill that's another {st:CanDuelGuard}. At 3+ {st:Agility}, getting hit while using either will trigger her S2-2. She gets another extra {st:SupportProtect} with her passive if an ally is below 50% HP.

1081501.desc:
Combat Start: Gain [AengduNewArmIshmael] and heal (Pride Reson.) SP for Blade Lineage allied Identities excluding this unit

Combat Start: If there is an allied Identity at less than 50% HP on the field excluding this unit, gain 1 [SupportProtect] (once per turn)

Skill End: Gain 1 [WindBladeIshmael] for every 3 [Breath] Potency on self (max 5, 2 times per turn)
1081501.name: Limbus Company Specialized Custom Prosthetic Prototype mk5 - Dokkaebi Arms

1081502.desc:
Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, this unit gains [BladelineagePride] for every Blade Lineage Identity on the field excluding this unit (max 3)

If 3 or more Blade Lineage Identities, excluding this unit, are defeated in this Encounter:
- Before Skill Use, if this unit did not have [SwordPlayOfTheHomeland], gain [SwordPlayOfTheHomeland]
- When this unit gains [Breath] Potency and [Breath] Count with its Skill or Coin effects, gain 1 additional [Breath] Potency and [Breath] Count
- If 5 or more Blade Lineage Identities are defeated, gain 2 additional [Breath] Potency and [Breath] Count instead
1081502.name: To Where I Must Return

1081503.desc: On Defense Skill Clash Lose, if this unit has 3+ [Agility], this unit cannot be Staggered from taking damage until Defense Skill End, and activate "To Claim Their Bones" after being hit (2 times per turn, excluding forced Staggers)
1081503.name: Demonfire Spinecleaver

1081513.desc:
On Base Attack Skill End, if this unit has 15+ [WindBladeIshmael], activate "Even the Balance - Lucent Rippling Flame" (once per turn)

On Defense Skill Clash Lose, if this unit has 3+ [Agility], this unit cannot be Staggered from taking damage until Defense Skill End, and activate "To Claim Their Bones" after being hit (2 times per turn, excluding forced Staggers)
1081513.name: Demonfire Spinecleaver

1081521.desc:
1 ally with the fastest Speed deals +10% damage using Slash Skills
- If the said ally has [Agility], deal +15% damage using Slash Skills instead
1081521.name: Cut Down What Must Be Felled
